src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Rule, org.junit.Test, org.junit.rules.ExpectedException) are not available in JUnit 5/Jupiter, causing compilation errors.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import org.junit.Assert with JUnit 5 import org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is not part of JUnit 5 Jupiter API; code fails to compile if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed or if strict JUnit 5 imports are enforced.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import org.junit.Before with JUnit 5 import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: org.junit.Before is not part of JUnit 5 Jupiter API; code fails to compile if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Rename JUnit 4 @Before annotation to JUnit 5 @BeforeEach.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: The @Before annotation from JUnit 4 is not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine; the test method will not be executed as a setup method.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Replace static call Assert.fail with Assertions.fail.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: Assert class is from JUnit 4; if the import is removed or JUnit 4 dependency is dropped, this call fails to compile.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner and context configuration annotations with Spring Boot 3 / JUnit 5 equivalents.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 runners like SpringJUnit4ClassRunner and annotations like @ContextConfiguration are incompatible or removed in the new stack.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 ExpectedException rule as it is not part of JUnit 5.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: org.junit.rules.ExpectedException is a JUnit 4 API that does not exist in JUnit 5, causing compilation errors if referenced.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Rename JUnit 4 @Before annotation to JUnit 5 @BeforeEach.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: org.junit.Before is a JUnit 4 annotation; JUnit 5 uses org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach. Using the old annotation results in it being ignored or a compile error if the import is removed.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Update imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 and Spring Test JUnit 5 support.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.Before) and Spring JUnit 4 runner classes are not available or compatible in a JUnit 5 / Spring Boot 3 environment.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Before annotation with JUnit 5 @BeforeEach to align with the new testing framework.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations are not recognized by the JUnit 5 Jupiter engine, causing test methods to be skipped or compilation errors if the old API is removed.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Test annotation with JUnit 5 @Test to align with the new testing framework.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Update imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 Jupiter API classes.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.

src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Replace deprecated HandlerInterceptorAdapter with HandlerInterceptor interface.
src/test/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.why_exists: HandlerInterceptorAdapter is deprecated in Spring Framework 6; while it may still compile, it is removed in future versions and using the interface is required for modern Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.

src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.general_idea: Migrate Spring XML namespace from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to comply with Spring Boot 3 requirements.
src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Spring Framework 6 require Jakarta EE namespaces; using the old javax/springframework.org schema will cause runtime initialization failures or validation errors.

src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.general_idea: Update xsi:schemaLocation to point to the Jakarta EE beans schema instead of the legacy Spring beans schema.
src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.why_exists: The XML parser or Spring context loader will fail to validate or process the configuration if the schema location does not match the declared Jakarta namespace.
src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.before:

		http://www.springframework.org/schema/oxm http://www.springframework.org/schema/oxm/spring-oxm-3.1.xsd
		http://cxf.apache.org/jaxws http://cxf.apache.org/schemas/jaxws.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context-3.1.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans-3.1.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/mvc http://www.springframework.org/schema/mvc/spring-mvc-3.1.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/util http://www.springframework.org/schema/util/spring-util-3.1.xsd">
